feed.title: What if we let Quantum Hunters get Bitcoin rewards ?

entry.title: What if we let Quantum Hunters get Bitcoin rewards ?
entry.summary: The email from Nikita, a member of the Bitcoin Development Mailing List, raises concerns regarding the motivation for participation in a specific initiative, questioning why individuals would choose to participate rather than simply appropriating the funds involved. Additionally, Nikita expresses skepticism about the origin of the project, suggesting that it appears to be generated by artificial intelligence. This indicates a need for clarity on the security measures and the authenticity of the initiative to ensure trust and transparency among the participants.
